name: Korshynov Mining Plant Public Joint Stock Company
summary: Korshynov Mining Plant Public Joint Stock Company engages in the mining of iron ore in Russia. It operates Korshunovsky open pit, Rudnogorsky open pit, and the Korshunovsky concentrating plant. The company is based in Zheleznogorsk, Russia. Korshynov Mining Plant Public Joint Stock Company operates as a subsidiary of Mechel Mining OAO.
